text.title: VUI Accessibility and Inclusivity Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply VUI Accessibility and Inclusivity end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: scope-flows
step.action: List voice flows + commands + critical actions.

step.name: measure-accent-coverage
step.action: Compute per-accent WER on balanced set; identify gaps.
step.decision-gate: If any accent WER > 15%, STOP and retrain or document waiver.

step.name: ship-text-alternate
step.action: Build text-mode alternate covering all commands.

step.name: dual-confirmation-on-criticals
step.action: Pair audible + visible confirmation per critical action.

step.name: help-and-consent
step.action: Add 'what can I say' help command; gate voice capture behind opt-in + reachable opt-out.
